title: ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. monticola
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. monticola is a subspecies of plant in the Asparagaceae family, commonly known as the 'Mountain Star of Bethlehem'. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. monticola include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally as a topical treatment or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
